これはこれは、<br>そこにいるのは凡人司令官じゃないか！: Well, well, if it isn't the Mediocre Commander over there!
プーーックック！ ……いやなに、とうとう世間に<br>この私の天才的な頭脳が見つ:
Pfft hahaha! ... Oh, nothing, it's just that the world has finally
discovered my genius intellect.
売れたんだよ！ 私の発明が！<br>ん？ 売れた先？ そ、それは……だだだ、誰で:
It sold! My invention! Huh? The buyer? Th-that's... W-w-who cares,
right?
なんだよ知ってたのか……。そうだよ！<br>何故か知らんがルディアが大量買いして:
What, you knew? ... Yeah, that's right! Beats me why, but Ludia
bought them in bulk for me.
ん？ なんだその手は！？ 金があるなら払いすぎた研究費を返せだと？<br>それは:
Huh? What's with that hand! You want me to repay the research
budget? That's different! Let go! This is for my next research!
